prompt:
A factory produces widgets through two stages: Assembly and Finishing.

For Assembly:
- Machine A can assemble 100 widgets in 5 hours.
- Machine B can assemble 150 widgets in 6 hours.

For Finishing:
- Machine C can finish 200 widgets in 8 hours.
- Machine D can finish 150 widgets in 5 hours.

On Monday, Machine A and Machine B work simultaneously for 3 hours to assemble widgets. All assembled widgets are then immediately moved to the Finishing stage. Machine C starts finishing them. After Machine C has worked for 2 hours alone, Machine D joins Machine C to help finish the remaining assembled widgets.

What is the total additional time (in hours) it takes Machine C and Machine D together to finish all the widgets that were assembled on Monday?
